FLOW.COMMENT: getActiveKnowns - get transaction knowns from the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE table

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: getActiveKnowns - get transaction knowns from the TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE table

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT KNOWN_USER_ID, KNOWN_PROTOCOL,... FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

Values.value: SELECT KNOWN_USER_ID, KNOWN_PROTOCOL, KNOWN_SERVER_NAME, KNOWN_REMOTE_IP, KNOWN_REMOTE_PORT, KNOWN_LOCAL_IP, KNOWN_LOCAL_PORT, KNOWN_FOLDER, KNOWN_FILENAME, KNOWN_MIMETYPE, KNOWN_SENDER, KNOWN_RECEIVER, KNOWN_MESSAGE_TYPE, KNOWN_ENCODING, KNOWN_SUBJECT, KNOWN_ACCEPT_SERVICE FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
0 or the sessionid of the caller

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

Values.value: FE0512 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller

MAP.COMMENT: extract sKnowns... from the first record

record.value: 0 or the sessionid of the caller
